# kDADiskDescriptionMatchMediaWhole | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Disk Arbitration ](/documentation/diskarbitration)

- [ kDADiskDescriptionMatchMediaWhole ](/documentation/diskarbitration/kdadiskdescriptionmatchmediawhole)

-  kDADiskDescriptionMatchMediaWhole 

Global Variable# kDADiskDescriptionMatchMediaWhole

Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.4+

```
var kDADiskDescriptionMatchMediaWhole: Unmanaged<CFDictionary>
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/diskarbitration/kdadiskdescriptionmatchmediawhole#Discussion)

Predefined CFDictionary object containing a set of disk description keys and values appropriate for matching whole media using DARegister*Callback().
